sample.title: world1_3: How massive are blue objects?

code.parse_mode_reason: Requested 2D physics subset pass; 3D lifting is forbidden for this run.

readme_task_contract.summary: Colored puck dynamics with latent mass/force/patch parameters.

queries.prompt: How do blue and blue objects interact?
How do red and red objects interact?
How do yellow and yellow objects interact?
How do blue and yellow objects interact?
How do blue and red objects interact?
How do red and yellow objects interact?
Is there a global force pulling the objects, and if so in what direction is it pulling?

config_metadata.experimentName: Learning physical parameters from dynamic scenes (Exp 1)
config_metadata.description: Participants watched short movies of interacting "hockey pucks" moving in synthetic 2D microworlds and then judged object masses, surface frictions, pairwise interaction forces, and global forces.
